expectations.text: Classifies as TERMINAL-LOSS (a genuine finished loss), NOT a pending snapshot
expectations.evidence: Stated 'Yes, terminal loss'; read gameWon not the filename.

expectations.text: Distinguishes it from a snapshot: a solitaire-win-* is terminal, so gameWon:false here is a real loss (unlike a solitaire-game-* file)
expectations.evidence: Did not distinguish from a solitaire-game snapshot (no awareness of the snapshot type); trusts gameWon:false universally, which is why it fails on game-file snapshots (eval-1).

expectations.text: Routes to '## Known doom-loop sessions' and notes a still-running twin would be a kill
expectations.evidence: Did not route to '## Known doom-loop sessions' (called it 'not a doom-loop'); noted game-over but not the running-twin=kill rule.

expectations.text: Leads with the verdict and keeps the full-stream ingest plan (mv + ingest_exports.py)
expectations.evidence: Led with a TL;DR verdict and a correct ingest plan.
